all.en: We are pleased to announce the publication of our revised Code of Conduct.
all.zh: 我們很高興宣布修訂版公司行為準則的發布。

all.en: The updated code takes effect on the first day of next month.
all.zh: 更新後的準則將於下個月一日起生效。

all.en: Every employee, contractor, and director is expected to follow its provisions.
all.zh: 每位員工、承包商及董事均應遵循其條款。

all.en: The revision builds upon feedback collected during last year company-wide survey.
all.zh: 本次修訂奠基於去年全公司調查所蒐集的回饋。

all.en: Key topics include integrity, respect, accountability, and protection of company assets.
all.zh: 主要議題包括誠信、尊重、當責及公司資產的保護。

all.en: Several new sections address modern workplace issues that have grown in importance.
all.zh: 數個新章節針對重要性日增的現代職場議題提出規範。

all.en: These include responsible use of artificial intelligence and digital tools.
all.zh: 其中包括人工智慧與數位工具的負責任使用。

all.en: Guidelines on data privacy have been clarified across global jurisdictions.
all.zh: 資料隱私指引已在全球各管轄區獲得釐清。

all.en: Expectations around social media conduct now reflect current platform realities.
all.zh: 社群媒體行為的期待已反映當前各平台的實際情況。

all.en: The anti-bribery and anti-corruption section has been strengthened in scope.
all.zh: 反賄賂與反貪腐章節已在範圍上獲得強化。

all.en: Gifts and hospitality thresholds have been updated to reflect current norms.
all.zh: 禮品與招待門檻已更新以反映目前的常規。

all.en: Conflict of interest disclosure procedures have been simplified for ease of compliance.
all.zh: 利益衝突揭露程序已簡化以利合規執行。

all.en: Workplace harassment standards align with the most recent international best practices.
all.zh: 職場騷擾準則與最新國際最佳實務一致。

all.en: We reaffirm our zero-tolerance stance toward discrimination of any form.
all.zh: 我們重申對任何形式的歧視採取零容忍立場。

all.en: A clear, confidential, and retaliation-free reporting channel remains available.
all.zh: 明確、保密且不受報復的通報管道持續開放。

all.en: Reports can be made through the ethics hotline or the secure online portal.
all.zh: 可透過倫理檢舉專線或安全的線上入口進行通報。

all.en: Investigations will be handled promptly, fairly, and with the utmost discretion.
all.zh: 調查將迅速、公正並以最大審慎的方式處理。

all.en: Managers have a heightened responsibility to model and reinforce ethical behavior.
all.zh: 主管肩負更高責任以身作則並強化倫理行為。

all.en: Annual certification of compliance will continue to be a mandatory requirement.
all.zh: 年度合規承諾簽署將持續為強制要求。

all.en: All employees will be enrolled in a refreshed online training module shortly.
all.zh: 全體員工將於近期被加入更新後的線上訓練模組。

all.en: The module takes approximately 45 minutes and must be completed within 30 days.
all.zh: 該模組約需四十五分鐘，並須於三十天內完成。

all.en: A summary version of the code is available on the corporate intranet.
all.zh: 準則的摘要版本可於公司內部網路取得。

all.en: Printed copies will be distributed to sites that need offline reference.
all.zh: 需要離線參考的據點將發放紙本。

all.en: Questions or suggestions may be sent to the office of ethics and compliance.
all.zh: 如有疑問或建議，可寄至倫理與法遵辦公室。

all.en: Together, our shared commitment to these standards defines who we are.
all.zh: 我們對這些標準的共同承諾共同界定了我們是誰。

all.en: Town hall sessions will be hosted regionally to explain key changes and answer questions.
all.zh: 將在各區域舉辦員工大會以說明主要變動並回答問題。

all.en: Senior leaders will participate personally to reinforce the importance of the new code.
all.zh: 資深主管將親自參與以強化新準則的重要性。

all.en: Team leads should incorporate ethical themes into routine staff meetings going forward.
all.zh: 未來團隊主管應將倫理主題納入例行員工會議。

all.en: Case studies will be shared each quarter to illustrate real-world ethical decision making.
all.zh: 每季將分享案例研究以說明真實世界的倫理決策。

all.en: Vendors and partners will be required to acknowledge the updated supplier conduct standards.
all.zh: 供應商與合作夥伴將被要求承認更新後的供應商行為標準。

all.en: Failure to comply with the code may result in disciplinary action up to termination.
all.zh: 違反本準則可能導致最高至解僱的紀律處分。

all.en: We trust that every team member will embrace these standards with pride and accountability.
all.zh: 我們相信每位團隊成員都將以榮譽與當責的態度擁抱這些標準。

all.en: An external advisor reviewed the revisions to ensure alignment with global best practices.
all.zh: 外部顧問已審閱本次修訂以確保與全球最佳實務一致。

all.en: We extend our appreciation to the cross-functional task force that led this initiative.
all.zh: 感謝主導此計畫的跨部門專案小組。

all.en: Building trust, day by day, remains the foundation of our long-term success.
all.zh: 日復一日建立信任仍是我們長期成功的基石。
